homepage.title: Martin Wrigley MP - Newton Abbot Liberal Democrats
homepage.h1: Martin Wrigley is the Member of Parliament for the Newton Abbot Constituency.
headings: h3: Surgeries and Help
homepage.text_excerpt: Martin Wrigley MP - Newton Abbot Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Newton Abbot Liberal Democrats Martin Wrigley MP Campaigns and Surveys In Your Area Volunteer What we stand for News Donate Join Donate Join Martin Wrigley MP Parliamentary and Media Appearances Campaigns and Surveys Fair Fares for South Devon Bus Services Health Survey Dawlish Rail Dawlish 20Mph limit Devon Road Repair petition Save Teignmouth Hospital In Your Area County Councillors District Councillors Town Councillors Martin Wrigley is the Member of Parliament for the Newton Abbot Constituency. Martin says "I want future generations to have every opportunity we have now - and more. We have the technology and the desire to put our environment first and to support our community, our schools and our NHS. With the public's backing, we can build a flourishing economy and a caring society while maintaining the ecology and beauty of our local area." You can find contact details, how to book a surgery and a sign-up for my regular newsletter below Surgeries and Help To book an in-person surgery, for help on issues or to invite me to appear an event please email me and the team at Martin.Wrigley.MP@Parliament.uk To book an in-person surgery, for help on issues or to invite me to appear an event please contact my office at: email Martin.Wrigley.MP@Parliament.uk Call : 01626 886520 Parliamentary security guidelines now strongly discourage drop-in surgeries for all MPs after the death of David Amess MP. I am happy to arrange surgeries by appointment. My team and I will do all we can to assist. You can follow me on: Facebook: www.facebook.com/CllrMartinWrigley instagram: @martin.wrigley.mp Bluesky: @martinwrigley.bsky.social Regular newsletters below: Sign up for email updates Oops! Please check the fields below and submit again. Looks like there was a problem with the submission. Please check the fields below and try again. Form successfully submitted First Name * Last Name * Email Address * You can opt-out at any time Postcode Sign-up The Liberal Democrats may use the information you provide, including your political opinions, to further our objectives and share it with our elected representatives. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy: libdems.org.uk/privacy . You can exercise your rights and withdraw your consent to future communications by contacting us: data.protection@libdems.org.uk or: DPO, Lib Dems, 66 Buckingham Gate, London, SW1E 6AU. Weekly Column and news Martin Wrigley MP - Privacy Policy Lib Dem Values - Click here for more Martin has worked in the hi-tech industry for over 30 years, with a background in engineering and senior management. Growing up in a Navy family, Martin lived all over the world. Twenty five years ago, he and his young family chose to settle in Teignbridge, and have been active in the local community since then. A former Mayor of Dawlish, Martin served on Dawlish Town Council for nearly ten tears, was the County Councillor for Dawlish and has served on Teignbridge District Council from February 2018. pages.text_excerpt: News - Newton Abbot Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Newton Abbot Liberal Democrats Martin Wrigley MP Campaigns and Surveys In Your Area Volunteer What we stand for News Donate Join Donate Join Martin Wrigley MP Parliamentary and Media Appearances Campaigns and Surveys Fair Fares for South Devon Bus Services Health Survey Dawlish Rail Dawlish 20Mph limit Devon Road Repair petition Save Teignmouth Hospital In Your Area County Councillors District Councillors Town Councillors News Lib Dem MP Martin Wrigley warns of £1,753 increase to mortgage payments in Teignbridge as Trumpflation bites Analysis by the Liberal Democrats has revealed the huge sums Trump’s inflationary war in Iran could slash from family budgets, pushing bills up by an eye-watering £1,753 in Teignbridge. 30 Apr 2026 View Fixing care is the only way to end the Devon County Council funding doom loop Liberal Democrat MP Martin Wrigley has warned that the spiralling cost of social care is harming Devon County Council’s ability to deliver key services. 24 Apr 2026 View South Devon MPs write to Wes Streeting with concerns about the Voluntary Redundancy Scheme at Torbay Hospital As of midday today, Torbay Hospital has launched a time-limited voluntary redundancy scheme (for all staff both clinical and non-clinical), which will be open until the 10th May. 20 Apr 2026 View Number of shoplifting offences recorded by Devon & Cornwall Police jump by 191.48% in past 5 years The number of shoplifting cases in Devon and Cornwall has surged in the past five years, whilst just 19.65% of cases recorded by Devon & Cornwall Police resulted in a charge, according to House of Commons Library data analysed by the Liberal Democrats. 16 Apr 2026 View No doctors, no development: Lib Dem Martin Wrigley MP calls for a GP Guarantee on all new developments in Teignbridge as average surgery in serves 939 extra homes since 2015 Liberal Democrat Martin Wrigley, MP for the Newton Abbot constituency is launching a campaign to guarantee GP investment on new developments. It comes as Lib Dem analysis shows that 1300 surgeries have closed in a decade (between 2015 and 2025) 14 Apr 2026 View Lib Dem run Teignbridge District Council achieves 53.6% recycling rate New Government data released in April shows that Liberal Democrat-led councils are the best in the country for recycling, with Teignbridge District Council achieving a 53.6% recycling rate, well above the average council rate of 43.7% 8 Apr 2026 View Axe the Tax: Chancellor has less than one week left to “do the right thing” for farmers across Devon Liberal Democrat MP for the Newton Abbot constituency, Martin Wrigley, has today warned the Government that they have less than one week left to "see sense" and scrap the devastating Family Farm Tax before it comes into effect on the 6th of April. 1 Apr 2026 View Lib Dem Martin Wrigley MP calls for maternity care rescue plan for Devon including one-to-one midwife care Liberal Democrat Martin Wrigley MP has launched a campaign for safer maternity care for families in Devon, to end the crisis which has seen far too many mothers and babies let down. 26 Mar 2026 View Cardiology 'Case for Change' Scrapped Today, Devon Health Bosses at the Integrated Care Board (ICB) have announced that they are dropping their Cardiology ‘Case for Change.’ This comes after a popular outcry against the plan to move the Cardiology Unit from Torbay Hospital to The Royal Devon 20 Mar 2026 View Martin Wrigley MP calls for ‘price cap’ on heating oil to protect households in Devon from soaring prices The Liberal Democrats have urgently called for a price cap for those who rely on heating oil, as rural households face a sudden and severe rise in energy bills following the war in Iran. 16 Mar 2026 View Martin Wrigley Celebrates Dedication of Teignmouth Coastwatch Volunteers Local Liberal Democrat MP Martin Wrigley has paid tribute to the vital work of the National Coastwatch Institution (NCI) volunteers at the Teignmouth Coa
